tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: You don't look well. Are you feeling all right?
Y: _________
options: A) Not really. I've been coming down with something all day.
B) Not really. I think I'm coming down with something.
C) Not really. I come down with something.

items.stem:
X: The doctor said I need to cut down on sugar.
Y: _________
options: A) That's easier said than done, isn't it?
B) That's easier said than doing, isn't it?
C) That's easier to say than do, isn't it?

items.stem:
X: I've been getting terrible headaches lately.
Y: _________
options: A) You really should get them to check out.
B) You really ought to have them checked out.
C) You really must have them to check out.

items.stem:
X: I've signed up for a marathon next month.
Y: _________
options: A) Good for you! How long have you been training?
B) Good for you! How long are you training?
C) Good for you! How long do you train?

items.stem:
X: I've been so stressed that I can hardly sleep at night.
Y: _________
options: A) Have you tried to take up meditation?
B) Have you tried taking up meditation?
C) Have you tried take up meditation?

items.stem:
X: My back's been playing up again since the weekend.
Y: _________
options: A) If I were you, I'd make an appointment with the physiotherapist.
B) If I'd be you, I'd make an appointment with the physiotherapist.
C) If I were you, I'd make an appointment at the physiotherapist.
